title: Doesn't support the modular import/export feature of es6?
author: surge-squirrel
body:
I only used the data to generate an excel file and then exported it for download.
Most of the functions are not used
But it doesn't seem to support esm
I packaged a file as big as 1M.

comments.author: gterras
comments.body: Hi I second that, it would be a great addition to the (newly reborn) lib. The minified output of 4.4.0 by rollup is 917KB which does indeed seem quite big for a minimal `new XLSX.Workbook()`.

comments.author: timonkrebs
comments.body:
Could you please ensure that this is implemented?
I utilized the data solely to generate an Excel file, which I then exported for download. Most of the functions in the codebase are not in use. Moreover, Angular is complaining about 'exceljs', stating that CommonJS or AMD dependencies can cause optimization bailouts
